views.createSql:
CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT id,
       transaction_name,
       transaction_date_time,
       authorization_code,
       customer_vehicle_code,
       customer_driver_name,
       product_amount,
       product_quantity,
       unit_of_measure,
       currency_symbol,
       created_date_time,
       response_code,
       response_text,
       tsn,
       batch_id, 
       pump_id, 
       controller_owner,
       copy
FROM receipt

CREATE VIEW `${VIEW_NAME}` AS SELECT
	C.id,
	C.authorization_code,
	C.transaction_sequence_number,
	C.transaction_date_time,
	C.transaction_primary_track,
	C.batch_id,
	C.controller_type,
	C.transaction_product_input_type,
	C.transaction_product_name,
	C.transaction_product_code,
	C.transaction_product_unit_price,
	C.transaction_product_quantity,
	C.transaction_product_amount,
	'LoyaltyAccumulation' AS type
FROM
	loyaltyAccumulation AS C
UNION ALL
SELECT
	C.id,
	C.authorization_code,
	C.transaction_sequence_number,
	C.transaction_date_time,
	C.transaction_primary_track,
	C.batch_id,
	C.controller_type,
	C.transaction_product_input_type,
	C.transaction_product_name,
	C.transaction_product_code,
	C.transaction_product_unit_price,
	C.transaction_product_quantity,
	C.transaction_product_amount,
	'Completion' AS type
FROM
	completion AS C
UNION ALL
SELECT
	S.id,
	S.authorization_code,
	S.transaction_sequence_number,
	S.transaction_date_time,
	S.transaction_primary_track,
	S.batch_id,
	S.controller_type,
	S.transaction_product_input_type,
	S.transaction_product_name,
	S.transaction_product_code,
	S.transaction_product_unit_price,
	S.transaction_product_quantity,
	S.transaction_product_amount,
	'Sale' AS type
FROM
	sale AS S
UNION ALL
SELECT
	P.id,
	P.authorization_code,
	P.transaction_sequence_number AS transaction_sequence_number,
	P.local_datetime AS transaction_date_time,
	P.primary_track AS transaction_primary_track,
	P.batch_id AS batch_id,
	P.controller_type AS controller_type,
	NULL AS transaction_product_input_type,
	NULL AS transaction_product_name,
	NULL AS transaction_product_code,
	NULL AS transaction_product_unit_price,
	NULL AS transaction_product_quantity,
	NULL AS transaction_product_amount,
	'PreAuthorization' AS type
FROM
	pre_authorization AS P
